meta.source_note: Steam 公开搜索页提供发售日期而非小时级发布时间；本报告按发售日期从新到旧选取最新条目。

items.title: 扑克战士 Demo
items.short_description: 这是一款以扑克牌花色为核心的肉鸽卡牌战斗游戏。红桃、黑桃、方块与草花分别影响生存、攻击、金钱与运气。通过构筑与卡牌融合，你可以不断改写规则，尝试不同流派与组合，打造属于你的最强卡组。

items.title: [ABERRATION] THE ANALYST Demo
items.short_description: Dexton-City is gone. A Class C Anomaly turned its citizens into the possessed before the city vanished. You are a PRISM analyst. To decode a dead agent's recording, you must retrace his exact steps inside a neuro-simulation. Can you uncover the truth without losing your mind?

items.title: Black Plague
items.short_description: 一款快节奏的肉鸽生存混乱游戏，击败无尽的瘟疫怪潮，叠加疯狂强化，并打破力量规则。

items.title: TO THE CENTER OF THE EARTH Demo
items.short_description: To The Center Of The Earth is a arcade style twin-stick shooter where you are tasked to dig as deep into the earth as possible, gathering as much treasure as possible!

items.title: The Belt Demo
items.short_description: A hardcore precision platformer built around a relentless moving conveyor belt. Master unlockable movement stances, adapt to escalating traps, and survive a brutal mechanical gauntlet where every mistake matters.

items.title: Weaponized Demo
items.short_description: Weaponized is a violent mining hooter. You are an asteroid miner whose employer recently expanded into mining hell. Use your machine gun to carve through asteroids and extract ore. Grab and hurl enemies, snipe through rocks, fight massive bosses. Make your quota and get out before it's too late.

items.title: Bitvania Demo
items.short_description: Bitvania 是一款混乱的动作平台游戏，在游戏中你完全处于无武装状态。你将穿越一个逐渐衰亡的黑暗奇幻世界，通过捡起地上的任何物品进行战斗——从匕首到榴莲，甚至是你妈妈最喜欢的拖鞋。管理你的耐力，并利用 1% 的概率触发巨额暴击伤害。

items.title: Shadow & Steel Demo
items.short_description: Shadow & Steel is a top-down hack-and-slash arena shooter set in a fantasy world. Battle hordes of undead, demons, and living nightmares designed to push your combat skills to the limit. Strike up close with your blade and weave arcane spells from a distance.

items.title: Life on Neptune Demo
items.short_description: Build a new life and a new home on a distant planet. Explore islands to find furniture for your house. Meet aliens and make the best of a strange situation. A Life on NEPTUNE awaits.

items.title: BCKSPCE
items.short_description: When an unknown friend request comes in you begin to question your friendship with Stella, your digital sanctuary quickly unravels as the truth comes out. A narrative-driven psychological thriller told entirely through a retro desktop interface.

items.title: Ninjas on Trampolines
items.short_description: What if ninjas fought in a trampoline park, but with paint?

items.title: Electro Havoc
items.short_description: Electro Havoc: A retro twin-stick shooter set in a neon-charged battleground where you'll face waves of geometric foes across 3 worlds. Lure more enemies into debris fields to trigger chain reactions, and grab power-ups to boost your multipliers.

items.title: Nimaat Demo
items.short_description: 直面堕落的诸神，在残酷的战斗中求生，在信仰本身化为敌意的世界里塑造尼玛特的命运。 这是一款以扭曲的古埃及为背景的黑暗心理恐怖回合制RPG。

items.title: Talas Demo
items.short_description: 穿越深空，火力全开。撕碎一波波敌人，揭开隐藏在表象之下的秘密，在这款复古风格的动作类 Roguelike 中探索无尽的协同组合，对抗致命的弹幕 Boss 与神秘遭遇。

items.title: 67 Minutes in Heaven
items.short_description: 你的邻居邀请你参加一场四人约会，并撮合你和从外地来的新女孩。在潜入一栋废弃的房子后，你的邻居提议大家一起玩个游戏：天堂67分钟。

items.title: Apothecurse Demo
items.short_description: Faced with expulsion from his order, fledgling alchemist Leon must brave the seas and travel to Port Gelour, a plague-ridden city on the brink of revolution. Craft potent potions, befriend quirky locals, and uncover the dark secrets lurking beneath the waves in a quest for alchemy and discovery!

items.title: Fishbait Demo
items.short_description: Dive into Fishbait, a 4-player survival card game where every draw is a gamble. Avoid the Traps, play your cards right, and sabotage your rivals in a race to be the last fish swimming. Fast-paced, strategic, and dangerously addictive.

items.title: NO MORE COWS Demo
items.short_description: Physics-based co-op platformer where you and your friend must abduct a cow and drag it all the way from a barn to a laboratory in space. Survive traps, zero gravity, and friendship-breaking chaos in online co-op for 2 players.

items.title: The Isle of Lost Bees Demo
items.short_description: Welcome to the Isle of Lost Bees, a cozy idle game where you and your collection of Australian bees harvest pollen, research flowers, and uncover the island’s secrets. You're a bee-obsessed researcher on an island devoid of humans. You never seemed to need human contact anyway.

items.title: 集换式卡牌检验员 Trading Card Inspector
items.short_description: 在《全球最酷集换式卡牌游戏》中，通过数十张独特搞笑的卡牌展开你的调查之旅！ 以官方集换式卡牌检查员的身份开启新工作，揭开一段关于友谊、企业间谍活动与谋杀案的传奇故事！

items.title: Management In Space Demo
items.short_description: Management In Space is a gritty sci-fi strategy roguelite where you find yourself in debt. Build, mine, trade, date, and defend using stations across the galaxy, all while wars swells, aliens devastate sectors, and cults rip the galaxy apart & release demons upon the cosmos.

items.title: Folclore Xamin Demo
items.short_description: 《Folclore Xamin》是一款主打激烈的2D动作平台与“Run and Gun”游戏。拥有精美的手绘动画，你将控制使用自然之力的Xamin双胞胎。熟练掌握射击、跳跃和冲刺(Dash)，击败森林之灵，征服亚马逊！

items.title: Throne of Decisions Demo
items.short_description: Throne of Decisions 是一款以中世纪为背景的卡牌策略游戏，每一个抉择都将塑造未来。作为国王，你需要通过批准或拒绝臣民的请求来维持权力平衡。决定子民的命运，带领你的王国走向辉煌或毁灭。

items.title: Dark Sorcery Demo
items.short_description: Dark Sorcery 是一款暗黑奇幻 Roguelite 游戏，你将在其中对抗无尽敌潮、解锁强力升级并打造毁灭性构筑。精通移动、传送与策略，在愈发危险的敌人浪潮中生存下来。

items.title: Arcane Arena: Survivors Demo
items.short_description: Arcane Arena Survivors is a fast-paced roguelike horde-survivor set in a grand magical arena. Wield powerful spells, battle endless waves, defeat mighty champions and prove yourself as the ultimate master of magic.

items.title: Nowhere To Go
items.short_description: A call leads you to an abandoned theme park. Now you’re not leaving until you know what really happened in the infamous theme park.

items.title: Wiseman: No More Breakups Demo
items.short_description: Fight through a moving train in a stylish rhythm-combat boss rush where timed four-button inputs become your attacks. Defeat absurd bosses, survive relationship chaos, and help August Wiseman get his phone back.

items.title: Paper Cannon
items.short_description: Paper Cannon 是一款通过简单操作击破球体的高上瘾休闲射击游戏。在每个关卡的末尾与Boss对战，强化你的大炮，摧毁从天而降的一切！哇哦！

items.title: ANVİLFALL Demo
items.short_description: 管理最后的矮人要塞。战前制定部队计划，带领战士生存下去，不断发展壮大，搜寻资源，招募更强大的部队，并观察你的决策如何影响战斗结果。

items.title: CHOPSTICKS: Stick Figure Fighting Demo
items.short_description: CHOPSTICKS is a stick figure fighting game set across the globe. With just one attack button and a focus on parrying, strategy is key. Each map opens up unique gameplay opportunities with map specific elements: from giant lasers to sticks that can be used as swords!

items.title: SINDIKAT
items.short_description: SINDIKAT is an online board game about business and money: buy companies, upgrade assets, collect rent, and outplay your friends in the fight for full control of the city.

items.title: Shadows of Fortificar Demo
items.short_description: A hybrid role-playing visual novel based on Dungeons&Dragons. Players take control of one of five playable characters, each of whom offers a different perspective on the story. The story is set in an original universe - the city of Fortificar, which has been struck by an incurable plague.

items.title: Featherless Demo
items.short_description: You’re a duck. You’re armed. Everything wants you dead. Fair enough. Blast through hordes of enemies, discover ridiculous weapon combos, and grow stronger every run in this chaotic roguelike shooter.

items.title: Fenestra Demo
items.short_description: A fusion of semi-turn-based battles and roguelike mechanics. Assemble a party of 3 heroes, explore dynamic dungeons, and discover powerful builds as you fight your way through fearsome monsters. Plan ahead and adapt to your surroundings, or meet your inevitable end.

items.title: Ampsball - Demo
items.short_description: Ampsball is a 5v5 action-packed sport that combines superhero powers under the beautiful Southern California sunshine. Grab a pair of sunglasses, a beach towel, and your most wrinkled cape for a sport that will make your arch-nemeses want to join in.

items.title: The Hat Man Demo
items.short_description: A first-person psychological horror game inspired by The Hat Man urban legend, focusing on sleep paralysis, fear, and the terror of being unable to move.

items.title: BioEden Demo
items.short_description: 此为《创生伊甸》游戏的试玩版本。来化身守护者，步入一段温暖治愈的经营之旅吧。在这里，你将为一颗静静等待疗愈的星球重新唤回生机。为数十种奇妙动物打造理想栖息地，迎接它们重返这个世界。充分发挥你的小巧思，让你的星球在一个个生态系统的修复中逐步复苏。

items.title: Paws TD Demo
items.short_description: 史上最萌的塔防游戏！

items.title: The Cascadier
items.short_description: 街机投币Roguelike游戏，搭配弹珠物理！打造强力卡组，投掷元素金币，引爆神级连招与隐藏路径，冲击高分！

items.title: The Sinking City 2 Demo
items.short_description: 设定于“咆哮的二十年代”，《The Sinking City 2》是一款浸润洛夫克拉夫特式恐惧的生存恐怖游戏。直面远古邪神，探索被洪水淹没的阿卡姆街巷，在亡者的追猎中前行，在一条生命与整座城市之间做出抉择。

items.title: Mist Weavers Demo
items.short_description: Forget near-idle gameplay. Control both Weaver and Familiar in a unique dual-control survivor-like. Build powerful synergies, survive endless hordes, and master two characters at once.

items.title: ABISMO Demo
items.short_description: ABISMO is a co-op deep-sea horror game set on the abyssal floor of an alien planet. Descend alone or with up to 4 players into shifting trenches, explore derelict facilities, and recover what you need to survive while uncovering an analog-horror mystery hidden in corrupted VHS tapes.

items.title: Necrofane Demo
items.short_description: 王国陷入危机。在为时已晚之前，打败死灵法师和他的黑暗将军们。探索被诅咒的土地，面对致命生物，学习禁忌魔法，在濒临崩溃的世界中寻找强大的武器。

items.title: Anomalous zone
items.short_description: You will have to visit an anomalous zone from which there is no exit unless you possess an artifact with which you can open a portal, an exit from the zone

items.title: Dark Web Incremental Demo
items.short_description: Dark web incremental is an incremental idle game where you earn money by doing criminal activities like selling drugs and hacking. Upgrade everything, and find all the pets and secrets around the map!

items.title: Gamble Inc. Demo
items.short_description: Tired of making money for your corporate overlords while you get paid peanuts? Hack into your work computer and syphon cash straight from the slots and into your bank. In this corporate dystopia jobs have been reduced to betting all you've got and letting the house (your boss) win.

items.title: Soul Diagnosis Demo
items.short_description: Your patients are dying. The voices in your head are keeping score. Soul Diagnosis is a dialogue-rich isometric cRPG where you are haunted by your mistakes. Navigate a labyrinthine hospital conspiracy, engage in fisticuffs with inanimate objects, and leverage your fractured psyche to survive.

items.title: ATTAQ ARCADE COLLECTION Demo
items.short_description: 一组完整、爽快的游戏，装在一个有触感的桌面启动器里。 你从一台旧电脑前开始，桌上散落着软盘。拿起一张，拖进驱动器，然后启动游戏。在跳入另一个世界前，先完成一个小小的仪式。

items.title: Truth Scrapper Demo
items.short_description: 你有一个案件要调查，每天你的记忆都会重置，而两位神秘的向导正争相吸引你的注意——你会选择记住谁，又会把谁抛在脑后……？

items.title: IT HEARS YOU
items.short_description: A psychological horror game set in an abandoned hospital. A sound-sensitive creature hunts you. Stay silent, hide, and escape before it hears you.

items.title: A Line Held Tight Demo
items.short_description: Tensions both political and personal are rising at the Brightworld mining colony. In this dynamic sci-fi visual novel you must decide where your heart and loyalties lie if you’re to shape the future and save yourself.

items.title: Burn-9 Demo
items.short_description: A spy thriller where you’re not the spy. Safe behind your screen, guide the last survivor of an elite black-ops team in a desperate attempt to salvage a mission gone horribly wrong. Caught between military command and your agent, information is your greatest weapon.

items.title: TOEM 2 Demo
items.short_description: Step back into the shoes of a curious photographer and set off on a brand new adventure all about uncovering hidden details, helping friends along the way, and documenting the world’s little wonders in TOEM 2, the sequel to the acclaimed TOEM.

items.title: Catechesis Demo
items.short_description: 在这里开始《要理问答》的故事：与主要角色们碰面、探索最初的地下城、并在大约一个小时时长的紧张玩法内容中直面众多恶魔。

items.title: Papaya Plaza Demo
items.short_description: Rebuild a cute and cozy little tourist town in this laid-back and relaxed slice of life game. Meet adorable villagers, hilarious chickens, and create your perfect little community at your own pace. In this simple sim, you're the mayor and it's up to you. What will you build today?

items.title: A Knight of Lothen Demo
items.short_description: Hack n Slash your way out of the first level of the game with some epic metal music.

items.title: nurny battles HD
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 18 篇用户评测中有 94% 为好评。
items.short_description: nurny battles HD is a little indie PvP auto battler with pre-rendered 3d visuals and gimmicky characters that can be played ONLINE or locally. it's also accessible to people with poor internet or ability to use controls

items.title: BonkCity Demo
items.short_description: 15-minute hip-hop roguelike survivor. Dodge the block. Draft perks and mixtapes. Drop bangers. Everyone plays the same daily seed — one shared dungeon design each day, one leaderboard, one crown a day. Vampire Survivors meets Jet Set Radio meets MegaBonk.

items.title: Do NOT Press Me Demo
items.short_description: A strange psychological game where every click matters. Press the button… or don’t — but be ready for the consequences.

items.title: Spiriki: Tiny Island Demo
items.short_description: Listening to the gentle sound of the waves, take care of three small quirky nature spirits! With their help and some patience, create your own tiny cozy diorama and bring back life to your overgrown island!

items.title: Pelican Post Demo
items.short_description: Pelican Post is a cozy narrative game about building community by delivering mail to a town of charming characters. As Port Pleasant's mailman, you'll get to know the townsfolk and make a difference in their lives.

items.title: Slayblade Demo
items.short_description: Build your battle-top and become King of the Streets! Collect 60+ parts, Merge their Powers, and Dominate opponents in this Chill Roguelite! Skate around a vibrant Y2K city, winning Cash and Upgrades on your way to the top. And if you Die in the game, you Die in real life.

items.title: Your Own Cozy Motel
items.short_description: Build and run your own roadside motel in a hands-on simulator. Check in guests, clean and repair rooms, manage payments, upgrade facilities, and grow from a small stopover into a thriving, high-reputation business.

items.title: Bit It Demo
items.short_description: A two player couch-coop platformer game: Jump, Fly and Enjoy your time with your beloved one!

items.title: HellHeart Breaker Demo
items.short_description: HellHeart Breaker - the monster girls you date grant you newfound powers, and the girls you don't... are the bosses you fight! In this dungeon-crawler roguelite, you are locked away at the bottom of the Underworld, fighting your way out. If all is fair in love and war - what will you do?

items.title: Journey Express
items.short_description: A hybrid 2D/3D adventure game pitting the player against countless dangers on a cross-country journey. Manage your resources and keep your party alive!

items.title: Project Pixel Demo
items.short_description: Welcome to Project Pixel! Build and share stages online, jump through hand-crafted levels within the game's story mode, or find hidden gems within the player-driven Community Hub! You can play single player or join a lobby with friends in online co-op.

items.title: Memoirium Demo
items.short_description: 《忆境》是一款复古风格的类魂游戏，故事发生在混沌无比、行将崩塌的梦界。化身梦人，适应这个世界诡异的法则，对抗你的同类，只为逃出这个埋藏于潜意识、光怪陆离的地方。

items.title: Particulitix
items.short_description: 少开枪,多走位。堆叠打破规则的升级,组成荒谬强大的Run。Geometry Wars 与 Vampire Survivors 的混合体,战场本身就是你的武器。

items.title: Late Night Duty Demo
items.short_description: 一款PSX时代风格的心理恐怖游戏。扮演一名身心受创的退伍军人，在他担任学校保安的第一个夜晚，原本例行的巡逻迅速揭示出这所马来西亚学校内隐藏着某些不对劲的事。

items.title: Farming & Supermarket: Clicker Demo
items.short_description: 点击、收获与销售！在这款温馨的像素风点击游戏中，在左侧点击种植 7 种独特的作物，在右侧管理你的自定义店铺布局。升级点击力量，打造你的终极休闲农业市场帝国！

items.title: Rabbit Simulator Demo
items.short_description: 兔子模拟器是一款重点强调枪击暴力的动作冒险游戏。

items.title: Book Nook Demo
items.short_description: 在 Book Nook 中，一步一步拼出迷你场景。摆放家具、装饰和细小道具，完成每一个温馨角落。无需压力与计时器，享受所有细节归位时的踏实感，感受每个Book Nook里蕴含的故事。

items.title: The Legacy of Shadow's Bane TCG
items.short_description: Based on the book "The Legacy of Shadow's Bane" featuring characters from the first book of the series along with many new characters yet to be introduced. This game features a single player adventure mode, single player versus mode (against AI), and online multiplayer with global rankings.

items.title: Milki Delivery Demo
items.short_description: Rebuild a community one bottle at a time in this tiny delivery adventure with your pet cow Milki. Gather resources and upgrade your barn, then bike along dirt paths, breezy meadows, and seaside cliffs to bring fresh milk back to the sleepy countryside.

items.title: Momento
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 10 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: 在《回忆房间》这款与众不同的温馨房间布置游戏中，你所做的每个选择都将影响人生历程！布置房间，选择对自己而言重要的物品，然后见证它们会对剧情产生哪些影响——谨以这段蜿蜒旅程，讴歌日常用品的力量。

items.title: LOST ZION Demo
items.short_description: Lost Zion is an atmospheric cyberpunk horror game. Awakened by a faint signal as a service bot, explore the forsaken megacity of Lost Zion. Uncover the Emperor's horrific secrets. Obey your sole command: Activate the Gravity Core.

items.title: Cosmic Flesh: Overdrive Demo
items.short_description: 抵御来自宇宙深处的无尽怪物。通过快速的爆发式操控进行冲刺与射击，释放强力的 Overdrive，在每一次独特的战斗中进化你的飞船，并将你的操作技巧推向极限。

items.title: GeckoShop
items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 315 篇用户评测中有 71% 为好评。
items.short_description: 收集并出售蜥蜴。装饰并改善您的商店。追贼。探索充满魅力和生机的开放世界小城市。 卖掉你的蜥蜴，或者把它们当作你的宠物！

items.title: Hospital Hell Demo
items.short_description: Hospital Hell is a first-person survival horror game where you will fight zombies and other abominable nightmares. Explore the halls of St. Olga's Hospital and try to solve the mystery of why this place that was once considered a refuge, has now turned into Hell.

items.title: Marsupilami 2 - Salsa Palombia - Demo
items.short_description: 帮助长尾豹拯救帕隆比亚，让它免遭 Queen Mummy 及其爪牙的毒手！ 一段奇异的旋律席卷了帕隆比亚……所有动物突然开始起舞，所到之处一片混乱！

items.title: 眼忙嘴乱 Demo
items.short_description: 眼忙嘴乱是一款让你手忙脚乱、笑到力竭的抽象模拟游戏。你即将要面对的是：多线程折磨、像奶油一样滑落的五官、爆笑物理反馈、抽象随机事件……

items.title: Cog of Y
items.short_description: 《Cog of Y》是一款回合制角色扮演游戏，玩家通过在回合中安排行动顺序、衔接技能选择并逐步强化角色能力，在稳定运作的战斗流程中体验以结构与策略为核心的单人 RPG 玩法。

items.title: Escape from Vlogger: Runaway Demo
items.short_description: 你闯入了一位知名博主的家中，想揭开他所有的秘密，但事情并没有那么简单！他把你锁在屋内，现在你必须想尽一切办法逃出去。在这场恐怖逃脱冒险中，躲藏、解开谜题并寻找出路！

items.title: Hexa Vanguard
items.short_description: Assemble your squad in HEXA VANGUARD, where customization is king. Assemble six radically unique heroes, equip them with powerful loot, and trigger a storm of random events. No two runs are the same in this strategic battle for survival.

items.title: Dark Breaker
items.short_description: Countless dangerous robots will constantly chase and surround you from every direction. Use your weapons and stunning special effects to destroy incoming mechanical enemies. Face endless enemy waves, withstand continuous pressure, and strive to survive in this terrifying yet exciting forest.

items.title: 都市猫眼恋语 Demo
items.short_description: 《都市猫眼恋语Demo》是一款都市轻魔幻乙女游戏的体验版。您可以体验到故事最开始的内容。一只会说话的猫、三段命中注定的缘分，和一个在大城市里努力站稳脚跟的女孩。当灵魂住进猫的身体，爱情的答案，藏在那双猫眼里。

items.title: Mortis Loop Demo
items.short_description: Die. Learn. Repeat. Mortis Loop is a 2D pixel art platformer where every death makes the world more dangerous. Master deadly traps, meet quirky characters, and break the loop — if you can.

items.title: Beaming
items.short_description: Beaming is a minimalist logic-based puzzler that involves directing beams through a hexagonal grid.

items.title: Tragedy is approaching
items.short_description: A first-person survival game set in a post-Soviet wasteland. Explore abandoned locations, fight the infected, scavenge resources, and build a base to survive

items.title: Mice Crisis
items.short_description: Mice Crisis is a cute and chaotic action game where you play as a heroic cat on a mission to save the town! Hunt down swarms of mischievous mice, smacking corrupted predators, and saving the town in fast paced, adorable action!

items.title: Froggy Brews Demo
items.short_description: Froggy Brews is a cozy narrative adventure, where every cup of tea tells a story. Play as a tea-loving frog returning to your old neighborhood that has changed over time. Brew tea for villagers, uncover heartfelt stories, and rediscover your place in this world.

items.title: 盟军远征: 地下世界
items.short_description: 瓦尔瑟利亚大陆，世界唯一的陆地，是一个多种族共存，充满英雄传说的地方。 大陆中心有一个被封印的深坑，传闻中，那是通向无尽世界的入口。 封印的力量无法破解，因此，深坑中到底隐藏着什么，一直是瓦尔瑟利亚最大的谜团。 某日，魔法潮汐爆发，封印消散，海量的黑暗生物从深坑中涌向地表世界。 世界的秩序遭到破坏，瓦尔瑟利亚大陆不再安宁。 以圣耀帝国为首的地表种族组成联军，集结力量进行抗衡。 鏖战过后，地表联军取得胜利，入侵的黑暗生物被逼回深坑之中。 地表的黑暗生物清理干净，但入口依旧无法封印。 为彻底解决问题，各族强者，组建联军，带领大军，剑指地底最深层世界。 那里，似乎隐藏着被历史掩盖的真相。

items.title: Transcendence in the Poolrooms Demo
items.short_description: Transcendence in the Poolrooms is an adventure game where you will experience infinite relaxation. Fall into another world where you will explore haunting places beyond reality, a liminal space unlike any you have ever been to and may never escape.

items.title: ShelfLife: Art School Detective Demo
items.short_description: ShelfLife: Art School Detective is a Mystery Adventure featuring a cast of romanceable weirdos! Befriend and investi-DATE 9 potential suspects. Use psychic powers to astral project into The Artworld and discover secrets. Unmask the mysterious ART KILLER that’s terrorising your campus!

items.title: Meaningless Random Numbers Demo
items.short_description: Meaningless Random Numbers is an Incremental Horror Game about earning cash through Random Number Generators but be cautious, God is Watching.

items.title: ERODE
items.short_description: 《ERODE》是一款元素融合玩法的肉鸽游戏。4种元素石通过不同的组合方式，合成多种武器与装备。玩法与美术风格不断完善中。

items.title: Operation: Outbreak Idle Demo
items.short_description: Play the Operation: Outbreak Idle Demo and survive against relentless zombie hordes in the first biome. Experience the core progression system, unlock powerful upgrades, and get a preview of the full game's weapons, skills, and zombie-slaying action.

items.title: BookStore Simulator Demo
items.short_description: Open your dream bookstore and begin sowing the seeds of knowledge among locals. Push the boundaries of possibility and immerse your business in a world of magic.

items.title: Cauldron Inn Demo
items.short_description: Trying to save yourselfe something unknown but unmistakably sinister, you hide in a mysterious inn. However, your temporary refuge turns out to be a trap, and now you must find a way to escape.

items.title: KILL HIM Demo
items.short_description: 在杀戮与探索中寻找真相。 KILL HIM 是一款黑白风格的类银河恶魔城游戏，你将穿越充满敌意的世界，挑战强大的敌人，并发现隐藏在一切背后的秘密。

items.title: Quiet Bruise Demo
items.short_description: Play as dumb plushies trying to keep a collapsing factory alive in this tower defence factory automation game. Build chaotic production lines, fight off hordes of cats and crocs, survive your own terrible decisions and keep the factory running.

items.title: Tsuki Journey Demo
items.short_description: A relaxing slice of life adventure game where Tsuki travels between beautiful cities, meets new friends, uncovers stories, and fills out collection logs at his own pace, combining cozy idle activities with short, meaningful bursts of progression.

items.title: Unchest Demo
items.short_description: 一款只用鼠标便能游玩的横板经营类游戏。进货卖钱，合成装备。干掉那些觊觎你财富的怪物，然后成为世界首富。

items.title: The Time‑Stealing Cat Demo
items.short_description: Side with the Demon Lord and sabotage the hero’s adventure. In The Time-Stealing Cat, you play as the Demon Lord’s pet cat and secretly interfere with the hero’s journey. Block paths, set traps, and create obstacles to slow the hero down and steal time before the final battle.

items.title: Shmup! Demo
items.short_description: Arcade-style bullet hell action! 3 ships, 5 special weapons, and screen-clearing bombs. Conquer 1 intense stage in this demo with fixed or dynamic difficulty—then compete for high scores on online leaderboards.

items.title: 塔防江湖2 Demo
items.short_description: 单机的，好玩不坑爹。 充满挑战和趣味的原创的国产塔防游戏。 邪恶的势力又在江湖中蠢蠢欲动。酝酿着不为人知的阴谋。 大侠，莫再隐居了，速速拿起武器，重出江湖吧。 阻止野心家们破坏江湖的宁静！！！ 九大门派，各具独门绝技。随心搭配出无数组合，挑战大侠的战略极限。 初出茅庐的菜鸟？笑傲江湖的各大名宿？九十个江湖人物！！ 上一届少年英雄大会获得江湖九俊称号的各派精英。助君纵横江湖！！ 四大势力联合成四方盟！！敌人空前强大！！！大侠做好准备了吗？ 十五个极具挑战的场景。随着游戏逐步展现。 三种难度，不论是新人还是老江湖，都能尽情体验游戏的乐趣。

items.title: Bookmark Hero Demo
items.short_description: Bookmark Hero is a fantasy, peripheral-idle RPG. Play from a bookmark-sized window on the side of your screen and instruct your hero with queued tasks. Watch as they explore lands, conquer monsters, hone skills, craft gear, and embark on quests. Even as you work, their legend unfolds.

items.title: 无法诉说的关系
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 11 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: 当堇的老师对她一厢情愿地产生痴恋之情后，堇的日常生活就变成了一个缺乏英雄登场的恐怖故事……存在的只有被害者和暴徒。

items.title: 至尊战神传奇
items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 347 篇用户评测中有 72% 为好评。
items.short_description: 经典1.80版重现，经久不衰，装备无限自由打，神装满地爆！在这款原汁原味的MMORPG游戏中，你将与同伴尽情冒险，成就一段强者的传奇成长之路。

items.title: 超时空怪盗 Demo
items.short_description: 是架空世界冒险喜剧！！！你将化身一位土著人，与一位来自20年后的少女一起组成跨时空搭档，前往未来世界冒险并搜集传说中能改变一切的宝物！本作是一款搞笑游戏，目的就是逗笑你让你开心！因此在冒险过程中，你会遇到各种各样让人啼笑皆非的事。 千万不要在喝水的时候游玩本作哦！不然你就………………不渴了呢……

items.title: 我的异世界酒店
items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 40 篇用户评测中有 72% 为好评。
items.short_description: 成为异世界酒店的经理吧！收集资源，挑战有趣的小游戏，扩张你的酒店，并让客人们尽兴而归。打造属于你的口碑，建设最完美的异世界度假胜地！

items.title: 激情四射高尔夫传奇
items.short_description: 主人公从隐居的祖父那里继承了一个高尔夫球场。 了无生趣的日常，因迎来充满魅力的女性高尔夫球手而出现转机！ 一起巡场，击出完美球的同时加深羁绊，目标是世界大赛！ 避开竞争对手的阻挠，开辟传奇高尔夫球手之路吧！

items.title: The Meaning of Auri Demo
items.short_description: Follow an Auri Field Researcher from the planet Auriga, as they land in an enchanted forest full of creatures who speak an unknown language. Interact with the inhabitants of the forest and learn their language to complete your research–and maybe learn a thing or two about what Auri really means.

items.title: ASEMA Demo
items.short_description: Build a space factory. Mine, harvest, exploit. Manage logistics with railguns, ballistic payloads and gravity-bending haulers. Fight gravity with Focus, climb the tech tree. Expand and explore the solar system in this factory automation sim. Everything is a potential resource - even the Locals.

items.title: Toxic Yuri Demo
items.short_description: An overworked office lady discovers a sludge girl abandoned in a box in an alleyway and takes her home. A poisonous and fluffy romance begins. Experience the most toxic love story the world has ever seen. In the demo play all of Episode 1!

items.title: Blue Fury
items.short_description: A helicopter combat game inspired by classic 16-bit titles. Destroy tanks, eliminate enemy forces, and rescue soldiers before an enemy missile launches. Manage fuel, ammunition, and altitude while engaging helicopters and avoiding AA launchers over procedurally generated terrain.

items.title: Diamond Eye Demo
items.short_description: DIAMOND EYE is a puzzle/platforming game with an arcade/time-attack design. Make use of a diverse move set that combines attacks and mobility to overcome various obstacles and enemies. The game features a replay system that saves your best performance on each challenge.

items.title: Spiretela Demo
items.short_description: 攀登高塔，击败强敌，揭开宇宙失衡背后的真相，体验紧张刺激的 Roguelike 冒险。

items.title: Hoverise Rebellion Demo
items.short_description: Pilot a fast and agile HoverTank in a sci-fi vehicular arena shooter focused on high-speed movement, explosive combat, abilities, and classic multiplayer modes.

items.title: gif catcher
items.short_description: The game is a calm game about catching gifs and I love it. In order to play, press start and move the mouse left to right. Try to catch as many as you can. Every upgrade you buy, The gifs get faster. Get ready for a simple, but very fun game made by the blue saturn team that will make you stressed.

items.title: Lost Stories Demo
items.short_description: Lost Stories is an episodic psychological horror game set in the Siberian forests during the Cold War. Explore isolated locations, uncover censored experiments, and survive what was never meant to be found. Some stories were not forgotten. They were hidden.

items.title: Substrate: Emergence Demo
items.short_description: Grow fluorescent cells that create mesmerizing emergent chaos. Simple mechanics hide deep complexity as cells evolve survival strategies through synergistic interactions. Catalogue successful lines and culture them to develop your own unique biology.

items.title: All Lanes Must Exit
items.short_description: Build a highway interchange to connect all the roads. Don't go over-budget and don't have traffic jams. Can you complete all the levels? Yes, easily, it's not a particularly demanding game.

items.title: Alien Apocalypse Demo
items.short_description: In this demo you will be able to try out Alien Apocalypse an open-world sandbox survival game set after a devastating alien invasion. Scavenge for resources, craft, build defenses, and harness alien technology to fight back. Play solo or in co-op and reclaim what’s left of the planet.

items.title: Gun Monkey! Demo
items.short_description: 帮助你的灵长类同伴逃回丛林，在重重障碍和挑战中开辟出一条血路。在开放的环境中考验你的技术，找到回家的路！你可以自由选择玩法，拯救同伴或者任由他们自生自灭，并解锁强力武器来帮助你跨越整个世界！

items.title: Cognitive Fracture Demo
items.short_description: Cognitive Fracture is a single-player first-person psychological horror set in a decaying mental asylum. Trapped in your fractured mind, you explore, solve unsettling puzzles, and uncover the truth piece by piece—while something hunts you from the shadows, testing your perception and sanity.

items.title: Blood Dungeon Demo
items.short_description: 《Nidhogg》原班人马暗黑巨献，配乐炸裂的全新 2D 平台自动射击力作！尽情掠夺鲜血、白骨、金币，用不断变强的实力爆杀成群妖魔！你，能活着走出这座鲜血地牢吗？

items.title: Azimuth Demo
items.short_description: Construct colossal megastructures in this industrial, retro-futuristic idle game. Manage grid-based modules, explore exotic star systems, and unlock the secrets of reality through exploitation and optimization.

items.title: Cyber Bike Duels
items.short_description: 一款快节奏的 1v1 多人对战战斗竞速游戏，未来骑手们将在极速中展开对决，释放强力技能、管理生命值，并在通往胜利的道路上以操作和策略压制对手

items.title: A talk beneath the tree
items.short_description: Can a Mage live free, when Magic can only come from Demons? Sylvain thinks so, but when he flees the Alchemical Institute, his old friend Celeste stops him, afraid for his life. 1 short conversation branches into 27 endings: each a kinetic short story. You choose what they say.

items.title: Beetle Sumo Demo
items.short_description: A table-top arcade style party game where you battle to be the last beetle standing in the arena. Pick it up and play instantly with very simple mechanics. Simple, easy to learn fun with your family and friends.

items.title: Retro Puzzles - Eviva L'arte Demo
items.short_description: A museum inspired jigsaw journey: 225 masterpieces, 45 artists, 9 regions, and three difficulty tiers up to 4160 pieces, plus fact based artist bios and artwork notes.

items.title: CRAWLER Demo
items.short_description: Experience Crushing Co-op Carnage in CRAWLER: A VR Mech Horde Shooter. Blast through hordes of acid-spitting bugs as you earn cash and extract from randomly generated missions. Upgrade your mech’s arsenal back at base while scrambling to meet the needs of an ever-growing quota.

items.title: 1666: Amsterdam (Prologue)
items.short_description: 序章带来了一段长约30分钟的叙事体验，您将初探《1666：阿姆斯特丹》的世界、人物与核心谜团。游戏的核心循环包括调查、追踪，以及在埃斯巴特期间直面“原初者”。这些内容将在完整版中开启。

items.title: Shy Cats Hidden Orchestra 2 - Demo
items.short_description: 一款全新的音乐主题找物游戏，你需要找到猫咪音乐家和它们的乐器。找到它们后，它们会为你演奏音乐。它们害羞又可爱，但非常有才华。把它们全部找出来吧！

items.title: ROGUELIKE CARD:BUSINESS EMPIRE Demo
items.short_description: 《肉鸽卡牌：商业帝国》是一款将肉鸽与卡牌策略相结合的工厂经营游戏。选择你的角色，用手中的卡牌从零开始搭建起一个独属于你的工业园区，体验各种胜利方式，并在全球排行榜上与其它玩家一较高下。

items.title: FINIS ACTUS
items.short_description: 1891年，伦敦。在一位著名魔术师的宅邸里，现实与疯狂之间的界限正在崩塌。许多自诩聪慧之人在这条走廊里迷失了方向。在帷幕落下之前，你能否洞悉幻象背后的真相，抑或将成为这场悲剧的牺牲品？

items.title: Dungeon Dilemma Demo
items.short_description: A Dungeon Builder and Crawler Roguelike where you can construct your own dungeon or raid one designed by your friends. Vie for victory, defeat minions, and evade traps as a party of up to 4 Challengers, or create the most diabolical dungeon imaginable as the Dungeon Boss!

items.title: 致命躯壳 II - 公开测试版
items.short_description: 深入《致命躯壳 II》中满目疮痍的世界，并与先驱一同踏上征途。在本次限时公开测试中游玩游戏开场的三个小时内容，部分进度将能够继承至完整版。

items.title: Spy Carnival Demo
items.short_description: 《间谍嘉年华》是一款支持2至10名玩家的社交推理游戏，舞台设定在一座热闹而混乱的游乐园中。间谍混入人群，伪装成NPC，破坏游乐设施并消灭游客。保安必须洞察人群，在嘉年华陷入彻底混乱之前将间谍一网打尽。

items.title: ROPES - Race Edition
items.short_description: 挑战好友，来一场紧张刺激的分屏竞速，或者独自攀登高峰，登上排行榜榜首。大胆回归复古情怀，为新一代玩家带来全新体验！流畅的3D动画和逼真的绳索物理效果。各种趣味十足的障碍考验你的技巧和精准的时机把握！无论如何，千万别掉下去！

items.title: Dimension Defenders Demo
items.short_description: Tower Defense Redefined. Race friends in ranked 1v1, defend together in 2-player co-op, or solo your way through dimensions of escalating chaos.

items.title: Thug Destroyer Demo
items.short_description: Horror platformer where you play as a thug trapped in a deranged superhero's simulation. 9 jump your way through 9 twisted levels and find 9 thuggies to escape. Spend 9 Nights at Thuggy's, Wake up in Quiet Hill, and solve puzzles at Evil Residents.

items.title: Bros Survivors Demo
items.short_description: 双人同体，极致混乱！在这款合作类Survivors-like游戏中抵御敌军尸海。与好友合体驾驶巨型机甲：一人控制水平，一人控制垂直。你们能默契配合，还是会命丧黄泉？

items.title: DrivApp
items.short_description: DrivApp is an urban transport simulator where you live as a professional driver. Play with a wheel, controller, or keyboard, choose manual or automatic transmission, face traffic, hear passenger stories, and earn money to grow your career.

items.title: REDLINE — Strings of Fate Demo
items.short_description: A sci-fi otome game where your choices shape love — and the future of society. Begin your your first semester at Redhaven University and meet the those who will change your fate and who you may change in return.

items.title: The Convergence Demo
items.short_description: A dark fantasy squad auto-battler where you recruit heroes from multiple eras, equip behavior-shaping chips, and fight through real-time battles across a collapsing timeline.

items.title: One more time demo
items.short_description: Parkour through flying islands, loot weapons, craft tools, and sabotage your rivals in a chaotic survival race

items.title: Cow Abduction Frenzy Demo
items.short_description: 跳上你的外星飞船，准备迎接疯狂的弹幕地狱挑战！在能量耗尽前，利用扭曲时间和隐形的能力，从饥饿的屠夫手中解救奶牛。你能成功绑架牛群并活着逃离农场吗？

items.title: Lost in Tandem Demo
items.short_description: In a post-apocalyptic world, a young girl and a defective robot called "Mech-ute" band together in order for him to fulfill his mission. Lost in Tandem is a colorful, relaxed-paced, 2D adventure-puzzle game, which can be played by one to two players via couch co-op.

items.title: GoatBrains
items.short_description: Goatbrains is a casual trivia game combining quiz challenges, short educational segments, an energetic endless runner, and a pressure-free meditation mode, offering multiple ways to learn, play, and unwind.

items.title: Midnight Massacre
items.short_description: Deep in the Angeles Mountains, your friends are having car troubles and need your help. Is it going to be a quick and easy fix? Or something far more sinister...

items.title: Vibe Idler
items.short_description: Run a vibe coding consultancy. Hire AI agents. Ship contracts. Buy faster machines. See how far it goes.

items.title: ZAP: Beam Of Fate Demo
items.short_description: ZAP: Beam of fate is a 2D platformer featuring a blend of platforming, simple puzzle and enemy fighting challenges packed in bite-sized levels.

items.title: Master Fall Demo
items.short_description: Master Fall is a 2D psychological horror puzzle-platformer where players rotate the world to manipulate gravity, solve puzzles, and uncover hidden secrets as reality slowly collapses into a surreal nightmare.

items.title: Sunset Sprinters '98 Demo
items.short_description: Relive the glory days of 1998 in this high-speed precision runner. You have no health bar—only a Snack Meter that drains constantly. Smash obstacles, collect aluminum cans for rental money, find CDs for your SpinDisk, and sprint from the Middle School to MegaHits Video before the sun sets.

items.title: Fantasy World Manager Demo
items.short_description: 打造属于你的宏大、鲜活的奇幻世界：英雄、怪物、任务与事件；文化、宗教与派系；地表、室内与地牢——充满故事、战争与选择。

items.title: Sinner Maker
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 24 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: Sinner Maker allows you to create up to 100 characters and simulate a society built around them. Construct homes, manage their needs, and watch as they fall in love, form friendships, and even become enemies. Manage resources and solve emerging problems if you want your soul to be saved.

items.title: Take The Wheel Demo
items.short_description: Some days you just keep moving. Play as a teddy bear collecting scattered clarinet pieces while a shadow car follows close behind. A quiet narrative platformer about control, forgiveness, and finding your way back.

items.title: Kodama: Slumber of the Gods Demo
items.short_description: 《Kodama》是一款以日本民间传说为背景的手绘2D动作冒险游戏。体验快节奏的平台跳跃、流畅的战斗，以及一段穿越色彩斑斓、充满灵体世界的神秘旅程。

items.title: Downer Management Demo
items.short_description: DOWNER MANAGEMENT is a 3-vs-3 autobattler set inside a corporate purgatory where every conflict is resolved through positional politics. Promote, demote, file, transfer, and stamp your way through Department of Management Division III. Forms in triplicate. No overtime. Termination is permanent.

items.title: Express 404 Demo
items.short_description: 驾驶暴风雨中的夜行列车，管理速度与乘客——其中一人是拟态怪。站点之间购买强力升级，完成危险配额，揭露怪物或从混乱中获利的 Roguelite 偏执模拟器。

items.title: Above Par Demo
items.short_description: Above Par is a physics-based precision platformer about climbing high and falling hard. Master a 4-club toolkit, calculate your trajectories, and get ready to fall... a lot.

items.title: Sineus Arena Survivors Demo
items.short_description: 迎击铺天盖地的敌潮，筑起钢铁防线！在《圣火守望者：共筑防线》满屏怪物的围攻下，一边疯狂输出，一边即时建造塔楼、围墙与防御设施。搜刮随机神器，强化武器与英雄配置，死守竞技场中央的信标——只要信标未灭，战斗永不停歇！支持单人游玩，亦可2-4人热血联机。

items.title: Tactorius
items.short_description: A chess-based spell roguelite where strategy is created in the moment, not memorized. Equip 150+ spells, upgrade your pieces, and rewrite the rules. Grow a skill tree as you climb 7 towers of escalating enemies and bosses. Your mind is the armory.

items.title: Saintless Demo
items.short_description: Explore the halls of the underground cult of The Open Hand. Experience the test rooms setup for your initiation in this psychological horror exploration game. Never forget....they are always watching.

items.title: Text Dungeon: The Ring of Life Demo
items.short_description: 没有图形，没有方块，只有文字 RPG 冒险！ 探索不断变化的迷宫，从巫师辛戈尔手中夺回生命之戒。 类 Rogue 文本提示与叙事场景交织，带来 MUD 与游戏书般的沉浸体验。 死亡是永久的，每一次冒险都有新的发现。

items.title: Drawn Together
items.short_description: Doodle, communicate, and play your own drawing games with friends using your own desktop digital whiteboards!

items.title: Tribots
items.short_description: Robotic warrior of a mysterious army, you are now stranded on a world unknown. Alone or with other survivors of your battalion, lead a ruthless guerilla and take part in the reconquest of an entire planet. A cooperative experience for up to 5 players.

items.title: Blank Canvas
items.short_description: You are a painter, living in modest apartment. Paintings are your passion. Empty canvas awaits your imagination. Enter the blank world of the canvas and reveal the hidden world around you and find out what the passion wants to reveal.

items.title: Project Absentia
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 57 篇用户评测中有 98% 为好评。
items.short_description: Play as an angel known as Abby in this retro shooter based on flash cartoons and sprite comics of days gone by focused on interactivity, verticality and cool weapons.

items.title: Nowhere Road Demo
items.short_description: Nowhere Road 是一款以战后城市为背景的冬季驾驶与出租车游戏。在安静的夜晚中驾驶、接送乘客，体验注重沉浸感与慢节奏驾驶的平静世界，而非速度与竞争。

items.title: Grid Wars: Last Stand Demo
items.short_description: Command a growing army in a fantasy tactical auto-battler. Place warriors, archers, monks, and heroes on an expanding grid, defend your keep against enemy waves, and conquer a world map filled with quests, rewards, and boss battles.

items.title: Adventure Honor Demo
items.short_description: 荣耀冒险是一款 Rogue-like 角色扮演游戏。在旅途中，你可以收集各种技能与道具来构筑角色；通过合适的增益与升级，在探索中不断成长，最终成为强大的战士。

items.title: THE LAST LOGIN Demo
items.short_description: THE LAST LOGIN is a psychological hacker thriller where you use GHOST//OS to exploit websites, intercept data, control cameras, and make dangerous choices as the voice in your head pushes you deeper into crime.

items.title: Dice Beauty: Roguelike Tactics Demo
items.short_description: Dice Beauty is a turn-based tactical roguelike where battles are fought with dice and elemental strategy. Face beautiful elemental heroines, exploit strengths and weaknesses, manage risk, and survive unpredictable runs where smart decisions matter more than luck.

items.title: Nexus Legacy
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 16 篇用户评测中有 62% 为好评。
items.short_description: 在持久化科幻 4X MMO《Nexus Legacy》中，从一颗行星开始重建文明。殖民世界，管理资源，研究科技，指挥舰队，缔结联盟，并为一座鲜活银河的控制权而战。

items.title: Leash Kid Demo
items.short_description: 认识《Leash Kid》：一个有着“大计划”的小捣蛋鬼——世界上最顽皮的孩子……被拴着绳子。在商店里大闹一场，尽可能多地破坏商品（以及尽可能多的无辜路人），直到妈妈把你尖叫着拖走。

items.title: The Background Warrior Demo
items.short_description: Always open at the bottom of your screen, this idle game lets you advance through stages full of monsters. Master different jobs and become the strongest.

items.title: Drone Arena Demo
items.short_description: 《Drone Arena》是一款第三人称竞技场射击（TPS）肉鸽轻度（Roguelite）游戏，你将操控一架全副武装的无人机来击退无人机大军。从各种增益和道具中进行选择，打造独特的Build，并在竞技场中存活至巅峰。无存档点。杀敌、战死、总结、重来。

items.title: Waiting for Heaven Demo
items.short_description: Waiting for Heaven is a psychological first-person-horror experience about waiting at a lonely bus stop between life and death. Every decision counts. Your actions, patience, and behavior determine whether the final bus takes you to Heaven, Hell, or somewhere far worse.

items.title: Roguegg: Hardboiled Survivors
items.short_description: 《Roguegg：硬壳幸存者》是一款俯视视角的类Rogue弹幕生存游戏，你将扮演一颗勇敢的鸡蛋，对抗成群的虫子。收集升级、管理你的网格背包，并打造独特的装备组合，在它们把你炒成蛋之前活下来！

items.title: Dire Echo
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 15 篇用户评测中有 86% 为好评。
items.short_description: **《Dire Echo》**是一款心理惊悚类步行模拟游戏，带领玩家沉浸于被遗弃的深空中那诡异而压抑的氛围中。

items.title: Kromex
items.short_description: 征服。掌控。主宰。 一款紧张刺激的竞技领地游戏，每占领一格都让你更接近胜利，而每一秒的疏忽都可能改变一切。

items.title: Demi Demo
items.short_description: 这款动作冒险游戏中，你将化身德米，勇敢深入索莫纳斯这个神奇的世界，听从神秘声音的指引，打倒传说中的诅咒巨兽，拯救这个世界。运用攻击招式和技能消灭敌人，破解谜题，揭开古老历史背后的真相。

items.title: Hawthorn Proof-of-Concept Demo
items.short_description: Former developers from Bethesda, BioWare, and Naughty Dog bring you a sandbox RPG realm of anthropomorphic animals and fairy creatures. Play co-op or solo as you build a village of memorable NPCs, farm, craft, explore, and celebrate the seasons in an ever-changing world bigger than you.

items.title: Gothic 1 Remake
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 4,541 篇用户评测中有 81% 为好评。
items.short_description: 传奇归来——在这款定义了一个类别的经典角色扮演游戏的忠实重制版中，重返采矿之谷。探索一个手把手打造的、栩栩如生的开放世界，这个世界会对您的各种行动做出动态反应，为您带来无与伦比、不受拘束的体验。

items.title: Pibcremental Demo
items.short_description: A cozy, chaotic idle-incremental clicker about growing a civilisation of tiny creatures called Pibbles in a giant tree, set in a post-human world.

items.title: Soul Launder Inc. Demo
items.short_description: Chaotic couch co-op game for 2–4 players. Capture souls and launder them for cash at a shady afterlife corporation. Work together, hit quotas, and launder your way to heaven!

items.title: Rift Horizon Demo
items.short_description: A survivors-like action roguelike. Slay swarming enemies to gather souls, offer them at altars to unlock and upgrade passives, and combine 25 skills to build differently every run. Each run lasts around 20 minutes.

items.title: Goblin God Demo
items.short_description: In Goblin God, you rule a tribe of chaotic goblins! Build villages, defend against evil humans, and unleash divine powers to shape the world (or cause mayhem). Each island brings new challenges—will you lead your goblins to glory or just enjoy the chaos?

items.title: Airport Security Sucks!
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 71 篇用户评测中有 84% 为好评。
items.short_description: 化身权力上头的 TSA 探员，追捕那些试图混入人群、偷运违禁品通过安检的玩家。 用威严的语音指令控制人群和你那只麻烦不断的 K9，并使用“合规设备”逮捕那些捣乱或藏在眼皮底下的走私者！

items.title: Necrovoid Demo
items.short_description: Necrovoid — a dark post-apocalyptic tactical RPG with 2d6 turn-based combat. In a world shattered by nuclear fire and Rifts, you carry a Black Parasite in your chest. Every death makes you stronger… and less human.

items.title: DA_RL Demo
items.short_description: DA_RL is a turn-based traditional roguelike with procedurally generated dungeons, five distinct classes, a god worship system, a deep item system, and dozens of enemy types. Every run is different.

items.title: Dustin Sunset
items.short_description: A post-apocalyptic world, a bastion of hope, the wasteland gangs united to destroy it, and only one man crazy enough to try to save it. Dustin Sunset is a vertical shoot ’em up with a touch of bullet hell and a whole lot of love, made by fans of the genre for fans of the genre.

items.title: Sender Unknown Demo
items.short_description: 在地下分拣中心上夜班。称重包裹，核对内容，在早上6点前完成定额。但请小心，有些包裹隐藏着黑暗的秘密。在这个紧张的PSX风格恐怖工作模拟器中，找出异常批次，赚取现金，并努力活过这一夜。

items.title: Shattered Chess
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 15 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: 构建超大型连击，打造打破游戏平衡的协同组合，并在改变规则的 Boss 战中生存下来——这是国际象棋的快节奏 Roguelike 变体。

items.title: Gambition Demo
items.short_description: 一款 Roguelike 国际象棋策略游戏，你的棋子将进化为更强大的形态，获得独特能力，并在不断变化的棋盘上构筑毁灭性的联动。

items.title: PATIENCE IS A VIRTUE Demo
items.short_description: Something's hiding in the cassette. Rearrange the words of your enemies to investigate a small-town conspiracy in this mystery puzzle game.

items.title: Plastic Ducks! World Simulator
items.short_description: A relaxing game where you place and customize rubber ducks on water, shape the scene by changing weather and time of day, set automatic camera angles for cinematic views and an in game radio lets you listen music and also add your own tracks, creating a personal space to unwind and relax

items.title: Defy The Abyss Demo
items.short_description: Survive relentless hordes in a dungeon deep within the Abyss. Swap between two heroes, unleash powerful spell combinations, and crush nightmares, demons, and immense horrors to grow stronger with every run.

items.title: BloodSworn Demo
items.short_description: BloodSworn is an intense, FPS Roguelite where players navigate through various levels with an arsenal of diverse weapons and magic in a blood-soaked, and terrifying adventure.

items.title: Mewlin the Clicker
items.short_description: 点击滚动水晶球，躲避障碍并挑战首领，同时构筑每局都会改变策略的卡组。帮助好奇的橙色猫 Mewlin，在这款魔法点击游戏中制造混乱。

items.title: Factorwave Demo
items.short_description: Fast-paced factory builder with combat and territorial logistics. Automate production, unlock powerful Sector Hub bonuses, defend your infrastructure, and expand across a hostile planet.

items.title: 20 Floors Down Demo
items.short_description: Forced to descend a dark dungeon of endless horrors, you must get to the bottom to escape your torment. 20 Floors Down is a brutal top-down horror roguelite where you must manage items, manage upgrades, and survive relentless monsters in the dark. And remember... DO NOT let your light run out.

items.title: Hovertron Demo
items.short_description: Hoverboard your way through a physics-based platformer. Easy to learn but hard to master; Flow and flip through a series of levels to chase perfect runs. Compete on a global scoreboard, or hunt down the secrets hidden throughout the game.

items.title: Loop Dungeon - Incremental Demo
items.short_description: 带领英雄小队挑战无尽循环地牢。收集战利品、解锁永久成长，并构筑强大的队伍联动，在不断扩张的增量冒险中突破极限。

items.title: Black Powder Box
items.short_description: Black Powder Box is a sandbox FPS focusing on PvE and EvE combat, a level editor, and both realistic and sci-fi environments. Create and play your own levels—or the ones built in-game. Join NPC factions in combat, solve traps and puzzles, and destroy things in your way!

items.title: Hug Factory Demo
items.short_description: Hug people to generate electricity to sell for money to upgrade your hugging skills to hug people to generate electricity to sell for money to upgrade your hugging skills to hug people to generate electricity to sell for money to upgrade your hugging skills to hug people to generate...

items.title: Down Under Destruction - Demo
items.short_description: Down Under Destruction is a stylised first person action brawler with an Australian twist, featuring a vengeful bricklayer taking on a demonically influenced building corporation, one brick throw at a time.

items.title: Time to Love
items.short_description: Time to Love is a 2D, top-down, co-op roguelike centered around two protagonists trying to keep reality from collapsing. You will traverse from timeline to timeline, strengthening yourself from each unique branch, seeking to bind what little remains after past mistakes.

items.title: Screenbound Demo
items.short_description: 《屏行世界》让你通过酷宝掌机探索双重现实！游走于棘手谜题之间，在众多关卡中奋战到底，体验融合了2D与3D的全球首款“5D”平台跳跃游戏。

items.title: ELEMENTAL RUN Demo
items.short_description: ELEMENTAL RUN is a first-person 3D endless runner. Navigate through increasingly dense traffic and survive as long as possible. By jumping, sliding,at the right moments.

items.title: Birds Hunter
items.short_description: Immerse yourself in the ultimate bird hunting experience with realistic shot physics, authentic ammunition simulation, and lifelike birds in detailed environments. Accuracy matters, can you master the hunt?

items.title: Solaris
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 14 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: 《索拉里斯》是一个关于追寻愿望与寻找自我的旅途故事。主角为了实现亲人的遗愿，遇到了许多奇怪又有趣的角色。路上充满欢笑，但走得越远，就越能感觉到：在温馨的表面之下，某种古老而可怕的东西正在苏醒。

items.title: Lord Of Anatolia
items.short_description: 带领14世纪安纳托利亚的卡耶部落，从小营地走向辉煌的桑贾克。建立你的王朝，管理拥有真实性格的村民，度过四季与袭击——一款深度殖民管理游戏。独立开发者倾注两年心血。

items.title: Death Standing
items.short_description: Death Standing is the first of its kind 'Stand' type of game, where the player has to do nothing but hold still for a set amount of time.

items.title: Tiny Town Market Simulator
items.short_description: Manage your own shop in a tiny toy town that comes to life! Grow crops, raise animals, craft handmade goods, and expand your market in this relaxing yet engaging management simulator that keeps evolving over time.

items.title: Bullet Train Demo
items.short_description: Welcome on the Bullet Train: destroy enemy towers, collect powerful orbs and improve your train! Navigate through escalating enemy territory to defeat the creatures that destroyed your town!

items.title: Online Boxing 3D Demo
items.short_description: A physics-driven boxing simulation where every punch is calculated in real time. Master timing, positioning, and footwork to outbox your opponent.

items.title: A Week in Paradise
items.short_description: 《桃源七日》是一款互动叙事解谜游戏。探索你抵达一家名为《帕拉迪斯》的酒吧的奇特经历，与酒吧里那位魅力四射的常客一起喝到天亮。每晚，在梦境中解开束缚记忆的线索。

items.title: Forest of Numbers Demo
items.short_description: Guide a hungry little monster through arcade-style number challenges by eating correct answers, avoiding danger, and building high scores in a colorful educational adventure.

items.title: Stoned to Death
items.short_description: While trapped in a stunning forested wilderness, engage in brutal hand-to-hand combat with a notorious durg cartel producing dangerous illegal drugs to uncover the mysteries of their crimes.

items.title: Wonder Warp
items.short_description: An Alien Threat Has Emerged in the City of Cynosure! Run and gun through a series of mazes to defeat the monsters.

items.title: Left Fore Dead: Zombie Battle Golf Demo
items.short_description: A chaotic multiplayer golf game where zombies keep showing up and your friends make everything worse.

items.title: Ashen Knight Demo
items.short_description: A dark fantasy survivor roguelike with automatic combat, where every run starts from nothing. Unlock unique heroes, experiment with powerful skill builds, and survive relentless enemy waves.

items.title: Gravy the gravedigger Demo
items.short_description: Gravy the gravedigger is a great journey of Gravy the frog through an unknown and mysterious cemetery. However, what brings our hero to such a strange place? Even the little cemetery caretaker doesn't know the reason, and it's up to us to help him in exploring this place.

items.title: TV Boy Demo
items.short_description: A Demo for TV Boy! An action packed top-down shooter. Blast waves of weird and whacky enemies with even weirder weapons to rescue the captured citizens of TV Topia and restore peace to the galaxy!

items.title: Breeze of Hope Demo
items.short_description: Breeze of Hope is a cozy stylized adventure about loneliness, hope, and the courage to keep moving forward. Explore a peaceful fantasy world, complete light puzzles and challenges, collect crystals, and discover a small emotional journey built around atmosphere, music, and meaning.

items.title: GlowCore
items.short_description: GlowCore is a singleplayer progression game focused on resource gathering and gradual world expansion. In the center of the world lies the GlowCore. The goal is to expand the world by feeding the GlowCore with wood and other resources.

items.title: Ibiza Madness: Zombie vs Demons Demo
items.short_description: Fight through a chaotic island overrun by zombies and demons in this fast-paced action survival game. Explore Ibiza, battle hordes of enemies, upgrade your weapons, and survive the madness alone or with friends.

items.title: MetalGods Demo
items.short_description: Live the metal dream. Rise from bedroom musician to stadium legend in this deep career simulation. Write songs, record albums, recruit bandmates, and compete against real licensed bands and procedurally generated rivals. Your metal empire starts now. FORGE YOUR LEGACY

items.title: Ball & Gun
items.short_description: Ball & Gun is a genre-bending, Sports-FPS game where you master your jump shot and an evolving arsenal of divine weaponry to hold back the undead. This isn't just about survival; it’s about becoming a Basketball God in the Ballpocalypse. A ball. A gun. Zombies. This is the new definitive shooter.

items.title: 核心防线 core defense line Demo
items.short_description: 你是一名云端运维者，在《核心防线 core defense line》中，您将扮演一名云端运维者，为守护核心，抵御源源不断地病毒入侵，自定义建立防线，构筑卡牌，安装各种创意十足的插件，让你有多种攻击方式，修复局外节点，同时也会给你提供更加便捷的防守

items.title: Backrooms: Blackhole
items.short_description: Backrooms: Blackhole is a cooperative psychological horror game for 1–4 players. Somewhere deep within the endless halls, reality begins collapsing into a growing void that consumes light, sound, and everything around it. The deeper you descend, the less the world makes sense — and the harder...

items.title: Bubble & Squeak Demo
items.short_description: Bubble & Squeak is a tower defence-lite, ambient strategy game where you wander, summon moss creatures, cast hexes, and build up a small camp and cauldron at your own pace.

items.title: Spacefield
items.short_description: Navigate a high-speed procedural abyss in this minimalist sci-fi runner. Dodge evolving cube formations, collect coins for powerups, and track threats with your advanced HUD. Test your reflexes in a pure, 90+ FPS pursuit of the infinite.

items.title: Follow Us
items.short_description: 这是一款双人合作恐怖游戏，两位玩家将冒着生命危险外出探索，只为取悦那些足不出户的观众。在《Follow Us》中，参赛者两人一组：一人负责探索，一人负责指引。信任，就是你们的生命线。

items.title: Snack Factory Together Demo
items.short_description: 一起管理一个零食工厂！生产各种美食以获得最大利润。升级机器，解锁新产品，并交付大订单。你能应对需求吗？

items.title: 东岚男子体育学院 越线
items.short_description: 故事发生在一所私立 MMA 学院中，一名自律克制的学员与一个难以预测的对手，在训练、对抗和夜晚的张力中不断碰撞，直到竞争关系逐渐变成别的东西。

items.title: 关守神 Demo
items.short_description: 《关守神》是一款以“被病娇青年无条件地深爱着”为核心概念的剧情向冒险游戏。 在异界的极乐堂，少女与一名神秘青年并肩行动，处理看似普通却暗藏玄机的委托。 随着一次次选择的积累，角色之间的关系逐渐发生变化，而这个世界被隐藏的真相，也将悄然浮现。

items.title: Pinbowling
items.short_description: Pinbowling is a combination of pinball and bowling. Knock over all 10 pins using classic pinball controls. Play a standard 10 frame game on your choice of two difficulties, or test your skills in challenge mode by avoiding and controlling obstacles.

items.title: 二手游戏店模拟器 试玩版
items.short_description: 从零称霸二手游戏圈！不管是AAA大作还是小众独立，这里应有尽有！凭毒辣眼光淘稀有狠货，靠灵活手腕划定市场格局。收售倒卖、轻松议价。从地摊小贩蜕变为搅动二手游戏江湖的幕后大佬，你的传奇，从此刻开场！

items.title: ResistanceZ Demo
items.short_description: ResistanceZ is a co-op survival action horror game for up to four players, where teamwork is essential to survive against hordes of zombies and mutants. Fight off waves of enemies with your friends and stay alive!

items.title: Airport Mania: First Flight
items.short_description: 在这款节奏紧张的时间管理游戏中掌控天空！指挥可爱的飞机降落跑道，引导它们驶向登机口完成旅客登机，再发出起飞许可赢取高分。升级机场设施、应对繁忙的航班流量，让你的卡通机队准点翱翔！

items.title: Baulk Demo
items.short_description: 体验每一次击球都充满风险的单人台球。一只大象掌管着这场游戏。安全与诅咒回合的顺序被完全隐藏。清空台面以购买道具，但千万别在诅咒回合进球。

items.title: ProviderHero
items.short_description: A relationship survival game where every choice has consequences. Keep Jessica happy for 30 days or face her wrath.

items.title: Pour Decisions
items.short_description: 一款温馨的咖啡馆经营游戏，悠闲的清晨将让位于忙碌的高峰时段。利用基于物理的饮品机制拖拽、倾倒、同时处理多个订单，一边将你的咖啡馆扩展到整个城市。

items.title: Ice Cream Simulator
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 27 篇用户评测中有 66% 为好评。
items.short_description: 在 Ice Cream Simulator 中经营你梦想中的冰淇淋店！使用各种食材制作美味冰淇淋，管理你的店铺，雇佣员工，装饰店面，并应对不同天气与各种顾客。

items.title: Xeno Swarm - 异虫强袭
items.short_description: 《异虫强袭》是一款硬核横版飞行射击游戏，和你的伙伴一起迎战铺天盖地的异形虫群，在异星战场上和巨型BOSS展开生死对决，重温子弹横飞的爽快！

items.title: Apathema Demo
items.short_description: Cursed to repair the inner organs of The Chasm, you fight to uncover the secrets of your existence and end a self-devouring cycle of Apathy. Apathema is a grunge fantasy turn-based RPG, inspired by God Husk, Baroque, and King's Field.

items.title: Urbex Simulator
items.short_description: Can you explore an abandoned building filled with cannibal squatters! Avoid a serial killer known as "The Urbex Killer" and find out what eldritch horrors lie beneath! A strategic RPG maker horror shoot-em-up where you fight against squatters who want you dead!

items.title: 杀手精神病兔子… 在太空！新星拓荒～
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 51 篇用户评测中有 94% 为好评。
items.short_description: 这是一款科幻生存Roguelite游戏，本作将“弹幕肉鸽射击”的极限割草爽感，与“基地建造即时战略”的运筹帷幄融为一体。在这个充斥着异星敌潮的残酷战场上，你既能享受高机动走位、火力清屏的动作快感，也能通过即时规划自动化防御网，体验拔地建城、碾压一切的策略乐趣。

items.title: 百创数独 Bactron
items.short_description: Sudoku Bactron 是由 Bactron 开发的一款具有逻辑性的数字填充游戏，游戏提供了随机模式、冒险模式。玩家也可以自己设计一个关卡，不断验证唯一解，使谜题只有一个答案。

items.title: 溺光症 Photophobia
items.short_description: 午夜叩响大门的奇怪玩偶熊，班上突然出现的神秘转校生，随着两位陌生的少女闯入你的世界，你平静的生活有了翻天覆地的变化。但没有任何关于她们记忆的你却发现，你好像对她们总是有莫名的熟悉感。经历这一切的你能否能平衡时间的天平，勘破真相，找到你心中的答案呢?

items.title: GeckoShop 2 Demo
items.short_description: Open boxes and collect geckos. Merge them in your lab to create new mutations, then sell or keep 'em. Decorate your new home, and build machines to automate every step.

items.title: Abyss Born
items.short_description: Abyss Born is a single-player dark action RPG with survival and dungeon crawler elements. Fight various monsters, explore dangerous dungeons, trade with allies and complete quests to face evil.

items.title: Chroma Climb: Reclaim Your Color
items.short_description: Climb toward the summit in a 3D parkour action game built around jumping, sprinting, and ledge grabs. As you gain height, a monochrome world blooms back into color while rain, sandstorms, and falling hazards force quick route decisions. Play solo or online with up to 8 players.

items.title: Parfait Crane
items.short_description: Parfait Crane is a physics-based 3D fruit stacking arcade game. Drop, merge, and stack fruits with a crane, chase high scores, and try not to let your parfait collapse.

items.title: Loot Goblins Demo
items.short_description: 打开宝箱，连锁增益，招募终极小妖精队伍。 将他们送入地牡深处。获取更好的战利品。重复！

items.title: Spooky Action Demo
items.short_description: Two objects. One bond. Move one — the other reacts. A minimalist logic puzzle game about quantum entanglement. 100+ levels. No randomness. No mercy.

items.title: 贝塔危机
items.short_description: 这是一款以暗黑都市为背景的第三人称怪物射击游戏。你需要击退怪异凶残的变异怪物，搜集道具与钥匙，破解谜题以求生存。

items.title: 百创数独 Bactron 编辑器试用版
items.short_description: 这不是一个完整游戏，这是关于《Sudoku Bactron》提供的一个用于数独格子的编辑器。

items.title: 牧羊人 Demo
items.short_description: 这是一部以末日求生为背景的，关于人性、杀戮和命运的视觉小说。在人类文明湮灭之后，在一切秩序都被打破的废土中，几名幸存者的相遇会碰撞出怎样的火花？死亡是终点吗？新世界又将如何来临？
developers: 黑眼圈工厂 Dark Circle Studio
publishers: 黑眼圈工厂 Dark Circle Studio

items.title: SCAVENGER ZERO Demo
items.short_description: RESTORE HOPE IN A HOPELESS WORLD. Fight hordes of enemies, make choices, and decide the fate of the universe.

items.title: Animal UFO
items.short_description: A chaotic UFO racing action game where up to 16 animals scramble to steal candy.

items.title: Overvoid Demo
items.short_description: Overvoid - is a dark sci-fi third-person action roguelike. You are a starship pilot trapped in an endless cycle across hostile space sectors. Fight relentless enemy waves, experiment with builds, gather resources, and unlock weapons, ships, and modules to break the cycle.

items.title: Ruinetarus Demo
items.short_description: 大雾弥漫在落寞的旧城——法洛斯特，思索着“戏剧性”，悲观的少女日复一日，于此度过自己稀疏平常的日子——

items.title: YGGDRA: SURVIVOR Demo
items.short_description: "You want ME to save the world? I'm just a convenience store part-timer!" A black tower threatens Earth. Summon 30 legendary heroes to climb 100 floors! Roguelite defense meets bullet-hell survival. Command your champions from zero to hero!

items.title: BOT.vinnik Chess: USSR vs the World Demo
items.short_description: 世界联合了他们最强的特级大师来挑战我们！但他们忘了一件事：苏联国际象棋学派是无与伦比的。入座吧，同志。是时候向全球展示谁才是64格真正的统治者了！

items.title: Hawkshaw Case: Truth & Prevention Demo
items.short_description: The Demo for Hawkshaw Case: Truth & Prevention. Play the first part of the first case! Learn the basics and have a little fun too!

items.title: Hawkshaw Case: Truth & Prevention
items.short_description: Investigate crime scenes, interrogate witnesses and organize your evidence to catch the culprit. Solve multiple different cases in varying areas and talk to many unique and fun characters. Can you solve it? Come and see.

items.title: Peril in Prymkos
items.short_description: Embark on a quest through the magical world of Prymkos. Explore ancient ruins, uncover hidden secrets, and face the mysterious Priests of Shaana in this story-driven fantasy RPG.

items.title: 单词荣耀
items.short_description: 通过拼写、默写、听写三种模式，在打字中掌握英语单词。涵盖小学、初中、高中、4级、6级词汇，从基础词汇到进阶挑战，每一次敲击都在提升你的拼写准确度与听力反应。

items.title: アノマロゲノス Demo
items.short_description: Anomalogenos is a fishing shooter where you spin the reel to shoot and dodge enemy bullets! You can create a variety of builds using different skills! Challenge yourself to dive deeper and search for stronger fish and better rewards! The demo lets you enjoy about one-sixth of the full game's content

items.title: Labyrinth's Depths
items.short_description: Step into a dark survival horror rooted in Greek mythology. Navigate a deadly labyrinth and evade the relentless Minotaur while seeking a way to end the beast’s reign.

items.title: 吾皇万岁
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 158 篇用户评测中有 68% 为好评。
items.short_description: 《吾皇万岁》是一款皇帝模拟游戏。你将穿越到古代中国一个风雨飘摇的朝代，在帝国动荡中登基为帝。选贤举能重振皇权威严，纳妃育嗣延续帝王血脉，练兵征战肃清氏族封君。是代代传承打造开元盛世，还是沦为亡国之君？

items.title: 黄昏远征军 试玩版
items.short_description: “何等铁砧，何等熔炉，掐住骇人的雷霆？” 在这款暗黑风的战术RPG中，你将扮演退役铁匠索伦，在灰烬与血海中集结一群伤痕累累的同盟。于方寸死局间运筹帷幄，直面疯狂的十字军与撕裂帷幕的诡秘魔物。挥舞利刃，精算协同，但请谨慎你的每一次落子——因为比死亡更令人战栗的，是无声剥落的理智。

items.title: Carpet Cleaning Simulator Demo
items.short_description: 清洗地毯、赚取金钱并不断强化的增量游戏。 擦、冲、刮——在时间重置之前尽可能赚更多！

items.title: Kinetype
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 14 篇用户评测中有 92% 为好评。
items.short_description: KINETYPE is a minimalist, terminal, ASCII, roguelite where your keyboard is the interface for survival. Navigate procedural terminal grids by typing commands to move and survive. Extract to bank Bytes for permanent upgrades, or lose your streak to the system. The terminal is yours to command.

items.title: Corner King: Boxing Tycoon Demo
items.short_description: 经营属于你的拳击馆，在这款深度拳击经营模拟游戏中发掘人才、培养冠军、管理合同、宿敌关系、伤病与冠军挑战赛，并在钟声响起时于拳台边亲自指挥比赛。

items.title: 137_DEMO_BUILD
items.short_description: CONNECTION ESTABLISHED TO 137 BETA BRANCH WELCOME USER

items.title: 光与影之恋 Chiaroscuro Lovers Demo
items.short_description: 只对妹妹温柔的霸总姐姐、多年担任主治的院长青梅还有只有自己才能看到的元气少女……失忆前的楚鹤白究竟是怎么招惹到她们的呢？“再后来，她成为了你的影子。” 一部略有些伤感的百合AVG，讲述着那些崩塌，遗憾，以及尚未说出口的爱。
publishers: 北京黎羽科技有限公司

items.title: 红线
items.short_description: 《红线》是一款卡牌回合制的科幻剧情游戏。玩家操控位于南极的“异常收容所”的所长，与突破收容的异常生命体战斗。 你将通过卡牌战斗、完成事件并获得奖励，以此构筑风格各异的卡组，并最终击败强大的收容物来完成剧情。

items.title: 韭神：技能炒股
items.short_description: 一买就跌，一卖就涨？受够了当韭菜？欢迎来到《韭神：技能炒股》——在这里，系统亲自给你发挂！ 这不是模拟器，而是一款让你用超能力炒股的肉鸽游戏。忘掉K线图，你的技能才是王道。 每局都是全新的市场，角色技能搭配随机生成的道具与周末奇遇。构建你的无敌流派，在十分钟内完成从散户到“股神”的速通，体验嘲讽资本的快感！ 系统都让我开挂了，凭什么不能赢？

items.title: Blueprint: EV Demo
items.short_description: Blueprint: EV Demo is a single-player strategy game about founding an electric vehicle company and running it through six fiscal years. Make five binding decisions at the start, then guide pricing, production, R&D, and finance across 8 quarters of real P&L and three rivals companies.

items.title: Mirth Island Demo
items.short_description: 《Mirth Island》是一款温馨的节奏冒险游戏。你将扮演一只名叫多多的小鸭子，在重返家乡后，与伙伴们齐心协力，重建岛上那座传奇剧院。探索生机勃勃的岛屿，与可爱的居民们互动，并畅玩有趣的节奏小游戏。

items.title: Miraclawns Demo
items.short_description: 这是一款通过“赌博”强化史莱姆的独特肉鸽策略游戏。作为魔王，通过影响命运的赌博来改变小史莱姆的属性，并将其送往战场。扭转严酷战局的，究竟是你的判断力，还是那绝对的“运气”？

items.title: 唬牌
items.short_description: 这是一款以欺骗与推理为核心的经典纸牌游戏。每轮声明一个牌面，玩家可出真牌也可大胆唬牌——对手能看穿你的谎言吗？两个性格各异的对手等待你的挑战，先出完手牌即可获胜。30秒限时回合，策略与心理博弈的完美结合。

items.title: 经典：贪吃蛇
items.short_description: 致敬经典永流传的贪吃蛇游戏。使用方向键操控小蛇，吞食食物让它变长，注意不要撞到墙壁或自己的身体。解锁成就，在全球排行榜上一较高下。上手简单，让人欲罢不能。

items.title: Corelith Demo
items.short_description: Corelith is a wave-based roguelike top-down action game. Explore the Corelith Dungeon, craft Skill Cores, and create your own unique build.

items.title: Cozy Game Restoration Demo
items.short_description: Cozy Game Restoration is a soothing simulator where you gently bring forgotten video game cartridges back to life. Tear wrapping paper, peel old stickers, lift away grime, and transform dusty relics into cherished collectibles. No pressure or failure, just the quiet joy of restoring memories.

items.title: 宝石少女 2nd.cut:For the Exquisite Attire
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 54 篇用户评测中有 94% 为好评。
items.short_description: 斩杀她，是永罚，还是救赎？在纯爱与嫉妒交织的珀亚教会里，年轻的宝石工匠被逼作出抉择：是让她活下去，还是——让她死去。

items.title: 爆射的哈基米 - 哈基米幸存者 Demo
items.short_description: 《爆射的哈基米》是一款快节奏的肉鸽弹幕射击游戏。你将扮演哈基米，搭配使用多种技能挑战海量的敌人。

items.title: HEME Demo
items.short_description: "HEME is a deep narrative journey inspired by real-life struggles. Experience emotional storytelling through sincere dialogues in a 2D atmospheric side-scrolling world. Follow a journey that mirrors the weight of reality. Join us and discover the meaning of life."

items.title: Retro Rail GO! Demo
items.short_description: 驾驶怀旧风格的日式列车，穿行于繁忙的城市线路和标志性路线。遵循时刻表、信号和车站规则，成为驾驶大师。在这款复古1990年代主机风格模拟器中，你可选择轻松之旅或严格专业挑战。

items.title: Mighty X Arms Demo
items.short_description: 马蒂 X 昂是一款受《土豆兄弟》启发的肉鸽幸存者游戏，拥有名为"昂"的可收集武器生物。组建你的阵容，升级强化，碾碎敌群，坚持活下去。

items.title: Alehundred
items.short_description: A crossplay multiplayer platformer where you're 10cm tall inside giant historical dioramas. Race through seven eras from 1956 Italy to 300 BC Alexandria, collect coins, claim Magic Gems, and compete with up to 8 players across PC, Android, and iOS. VR standalone support coming post-launch.

items.title: ZapStick Demo
items.short_description: 一记电击,看他们飞天而去。《ZapStick》是一款色彩缤纷、混乱十足的魔法乱斗游戏,爆炸的水晶与飞舞的身体让每一场对局都难以忘怀。单人或多人,纯粹的疯狂任你尽兴。

potential_items.title: GeckoShop
potential_items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 315 篇用户评测中有 71% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 收集并出售蜥蜴。装饰并改善您的商店。追贼。探索充满魅力和生机的开放世界小城市。 卖掉你的蜥蜴，或者把它们当作你的宠物！

potential_items.title: 至尊战神传奇
potential_items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 346 篇用户评测中有 72% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 经典1.80版重现，经久不衰，装备无限自由打，神装满地爆！在这款原汁原味的MMORPG游戏中，你将与同伴尽情冒险，成就一段强者的传奇成长之路。

potential_items.title: Project Absentia
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 57 篇用户评测中有 98% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: Play as an angel known as Abby in this retro shooter based on flash cartoons and sprite comics of days gone by focused on interactivity, verticality and cool weapons.

potential_items.title: Gothic 1 Remake
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 4,582 篇用户评测中有 81% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 传奇归来——在这款定义了一个类别的经典角色扮演游戏的忠实重制版中，重返采矿之谷。探索一个手把手打造的、栩栩如生的开放世界，这个世界会对您的各种行动做出动态反应，为您带来无与伦比、不受拘束的体验。

potential_items.title: Airport Security Sucks!
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 68 篇用户评测中有 83% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 化身权力上头的 TSA 探员，追捕那些试图混入人群、偷运违禁品通过安检的玩家。 用威严的语音指令控制人群和你那只麻烦不断的 K9，并使用“合规设备”逮捕那些捣乱或藏在眼皮底下的走私者！

potential_items.title: Goalkeeper Journey
potential_items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 76 篇用户评测中有 76% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: Step into the gloves of a rising goalkeeper, starting your journey at local clubs and working your way to the world’s biggest football stages.

potential_items.title: 魔女：终末旅途
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 358 篇用户评测中有 81% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 深渊已经腐坏，象征着终焉的魔女们将在奥尔德林苏醒。你将执掌每位魔女的命运轨迹，以卡组构筑无限可能。创造属于你独一无二的卡牌，自定义魔女们的日程，在策略交锋的战场中，每一次精心构筑，都是在重塑世界的轨迹——是携手寻找希望，还是为世界献上终焉？结局，由你来改写...

potential_items.title: Eterspire
potential_items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 1,106 篇用户评测中有 76% 为好评。
